zh.lifeSummary: 當Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr於1377年出生在威爾士布洛可爾特加內時，她的父親Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd18歲，母親Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer20歲。她和Sir John de Scudamore, Knight至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1447年在英國賀福爾霍爾梅 拉西享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr于1377年出生在威尔士布洛可爾特加內时，她的父亲Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd18岁，母亲Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer20岁。她和Sir John de Scudamore, Knight至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1447年在英国賀福爾霍爾梅 拉西享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alice
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr was born in 1377, in Treffgarne, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, was 18 and her mother, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, was 20. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Sir John de Scudamore, Knight. She died in 1447, in Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.of,Abergavenny lp,Monmouthshire,England: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr est née en 1377, à Treffgarne, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Sir John de Scudamore, Knight. Elle est décédée en 1447, à Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr 1377 in Treffgarne, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd 18 und ihre Mutter Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer 20. Sie hatte mit Sir John de Scudamore, Knight mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1447 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr è nata il nel 1377 nel Treffgarne, Pembrokeshire, Galles, sua padre, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Sir John de Scudamore, Knight. Morì nel 1447, nel Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alys ferch Owain Glyndwrが1377年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアトレフガーンで生まれた時，父Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffyddは18歳，母Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmerは20歳であった。彼女はSir John de Scudamore, Knightとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1447年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアホールメ ラシで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr(이)가 1377년 웨일스 p브로케실르 트레프가니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir John de Scudamore, Knight(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 영국 허퍼드실르 홀 레이시에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr nasceu em 1377, em Treffgarne, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Sir John de Scudamore, Knight. Ela faleceu em 1447, em Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr родилась в 1377 г. в местности треффгарн, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Sir John de Scudamore, Knight. Она умерла в 1447 г. в местности холм ласи, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alys ferch Owain Glyndwr nació en 1377, en Treffgarne, Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Sir John de Scudamore, Knight. Murió en 1447, en Holme Lacy, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
